name: Risheng Liu's Personal Page
body:
***
### Experiences
* 2016-Now, Hong Kong Scholar, Department of Computing at Hong Kong Polytechnic University.
* 2015-Now, Associate Professor, School of Software Technology at Dalian University of Technology. 
* 2014-2015, Assistant Professor, School of Software Technology at Dalian University of Technology. 
* 2013-2014, Visiting Researcher, Institute of Computing Technology, CAS. 
* 2012-2014, Postdoctoral Fellow, Faculty of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering  at Dalian University of Technology. 

### Educations 
* 2010-2012, Joint Ph.D, Robotics Institute at Carnegie Mellon University. (with Prof. Fernando De la Torre, CMU)
* 2007-2012, Ph.D,  School of Mathematical Science at Daian University of Technology. (with Prof. Zhixun Su, DUT and Prof. Zhouchen Lin, PKU)
* 2003-2007, Bechelor, School of Mathematical Science at Daian University of Technology

### Research:
My current research  interests include various mathematical tools and their applications in machine learning, computer vision and multimeida.
* PDE Learning 
* Sparse Coding
* Convex/Non-convex Optimization
* Vision and Multimedia Analysis

### Publications
### 2016:
1. **Risheng Liu***, Guangyu Zhong, Junjie Cao, Zhouchen Lin, Shiguang Shan, and Zhongxuan Luo. Learning to Diffuse: A New Perspective to Design PDEs for Visual Analysis. IEEE TPAMI (IF=5.728, SCI, A类期刊)
1. Kewei Tang, David B. Dunson, Zhixun Su, **Risheng Liu**, Jie Zhang and Jiangxin Dong. Subspace Segmentation by Dense Block and Sparse Representation. Neural Networks, 2016 (IF=1.927, SCI, B类期刊).
1. **Risheng Liu** and Zhixun Su. Advanced Manifold Learning: Feature Extraction via Vector Bundle Learning. Mathematical Problems in Data Science, Springer, 2016 (Book Chapter)
1. Yiyang Wang, **Risheng Liu***, Xiaoliang Song and Zhixun Su. Linearized Alternating Direction Method with Penalization for Nonconvex and Nonsmooth Optimization. AAAI 2016 (A类会议)

### 2015：
1. **Risheng Liu***, Guangyu Zhong, Junjie Cao and Zhixun Su. Diffuse Visual Attention for Saliency Detection. Journal of Electronic Imaging, 2015 (IF=0.85, SCI)
1. **Risheng Liu***, Shanshan Bai, Zhisun Su, Changcheng Zhang and Chunhai Sun. Robust Visual Tracking via L0 Regularized Local Low-Rank Feature Learning. Journal of Electronic Imaging, 2015 (IF=0.85, SCI)
1. Xiuping Liu, Jie Zhang, **Risheng Liu**, Bo Li, Jun Wang and Junjie Cao. Low-rank 3D Mesh Segmentation and Labeling with Structure Guiding. Computers & Graphics, 2015.(IF=1.029，SCI, C类期刊)
1. Xiuping Liu, Shuhua Li, **Risheng Liu**, Jun Wang, Hui Wang and Junjie Cao. Properly Constrained Orthonormal Functional Maps for Intrinsic Symmetries. Computers & Graphics, 2015. (IF=1.029，SCI, C类期刊)
1. Guangyu Zhong, **Risheng Liu**, Junjie Cao and Zhixun Su. A Generalized Nonlocal Mean Framework with Object-Level Cues for Saliency Detection. The Visual Computer. 2015 (IF=1.073, SCI, C类期刊)
1. Yuntao Li, Xin Fan, **Risheng Liu**, Yuyao Feng, Zhongxuan Luo and Zezhou Li. Characteristic Number Regression for Facial Feature Extraction. ICME 2015 (Oral, 接受率:15%, EI, B类会议, Best Student Paper Award)
1. Guangyu Zhong, **Risheng Liu***, and Zhixun Su. Robust Visual Tracking via Discriminative Sequential Ranking. ICIP 2015 (EI, C类会议)
1. Jing Wang, Yiyang Wang, **Risheng Liu*** and Zhixun Su. Visual Tracking via Orthogonal Sparse Coding. ICIP 2015 (EI, C类会议)
1. Di Wang, **Risheng Liu***, and Zhixun Su. Robust Visual Tracking via Guided Low-Rank Subspace Learning. ICIP 2015 (EI, C类会议)
1. Difei Gao, Lili Pan, **Risheng Liu**, Rui Chen, and Mei Xie. Correlated Warped Gaussian Processes for Gender-Specific Age Estimation. ICIP 2015 (EI, C类会议)
1. Meng Pang, Chuang Lin, **Risheng Liu**, Xin Fan and Jifeng Jiang. Sparse Concept Discriminant Matrix Factorization for Image Representation. ICIP 2015 (EI, C类会议, Oral, Top 10% paper)
1. Binghui Wang, **Risheng Liu**, Chuang Lin, Xin Fan. Matrix Factorization with Column L0-Norm Constraint for Robust Mult-subspace Analysis. ICDM(W) 2015

### 2014：
1. **Risheng Liu**, Junjie Cao, Zhouchen Lin and Shiguang Shan. Adaptive Partial Differential Equation Learning for Visual Saliency Detection. CVPR 2014 (Oral, 接受率: 5.75%, EI, A类会议).
1. Yiyang Wang, **Risheng Liu**, Xiaoliang Song and Zhixun Su. Nonlocal L0 Minimization for Saliency Detection, ACCV 2014 (Oral, 接受率：< 4%, EI, C类会议).
1. **Risheng Liu***, Wei Jin, Zhixun Su and Changcheng Zhang. Latent Subspace Projection Pursuit with Online Optimization for Robust Visual Tracking. IEEE Multimedia Magazine, 2014 (IF = 1.767, SCI)
1. **Risheng Liu***, Zhouchen Lin, and Zhixun Su. Learning Markov Random Walks for Robust Subspace Clustering and Estimation. Neural Networks, 2014 (IF=1.927, SCI, B类期刊).
1. Zhouchen Lin, **Risheng Liu***, and Huan Li. Linearized Alternating Direction Method with Parallel Splitting and Adaptive Penalty for Separable Convex Programs in Machine Learning. Machine Learning Journal (IF=1.454, SCI, B类期刊).
1. Kewei Tang, **Risheng Liu**, Zhixun Su and Jie Zhang. Structure Constrained Low-Rank Representation. IEEE Trans. NNLS (IF=3.766, SCI, B类期刊).
1. **Risheng Liu**, Zhouchen Lin, Zhixun Su and Junbin Gao. Linear Time Principal Component Pursuit and Its Extensions Using $\ell_1$ Filtering. Neurocomputing, 2014 (IF=1.634, SCI, C类期刊).
1. Jinshan Pan, **Risheng Liu**, Zhixun Su and Guili Liu. Motion Blur Kernel Estimation via Salient Edges and Low Rank Prior. ICME 2014 (EI, Oral, B类会议).
1. Wei Jin, **Risheng Liu***, Zhixun Su, Changcheng Zhang and Shanshan Bai. Robust Visual Tracking Using Latent Subspace Projection Pursuit. ICME 2014 (EI, Oral, B类会议， Best Student Paper Award).
1. Shanshan Bai, **Risheng Liu***, Zhixun Su, Changcheng Zhang and Jin Wei. Incremental Robust Local Dictionary Learning for Visual Tracking. ICME 2014 (EI, B类会议).
1. **Risheng Liu***, Maoran Bian, Zhixun Su, Jinshan Pan, and Bo Li. Saliency Detection Using Prior Guided Multi-view Low-rank Modeling. Journal of Information and Computational Science, 2014 (EI).
1. Yuxia Song, Junjie Cao, **Risheng Liu**, Guangyu Zhong, and Zhixun Su. Saliency Detection via Ranking with Reconstruction Error. Journal of Information and Computational Science, 2014 (EI).

### 2013：
1. **Risheng Liu**, Zhouchen Lin, and Zhixun Su. Linearized Alternating Direction Method with Parallel Splitting and Adaptive Penalty for Separable Convex Programs in Machine Learning. Journal of Machine Learning Research, 2013 (ACML 2013 Long Oral, 接受率: 12%).
1. Yue Deng, Qionghai Dai, **Risheng Liu**, Zengke Zhang and Sanqing Hu. Low-Rank Structure Learning via Non-Convex Heuristic Recovery. IEEE Trans. NNLS, 2013 (IF=3.766, SCI, B类期刊).被推荐为IEEE Computational Intelligence Magazine Publication Spotlight（亮点论文）.
1. **Risheng Liu**, Zhouchen Lin, Wei Zhang, Kewei Tang and Zhixun Su. Toward Designing Intelligent PDEs for Computer Vision: An Optimal Control Approach. Image and Vision Computing, 2013 (IF=1.952, SCI, C类期刊).
1. Changcheng Zhang, **Risheng Liu***, Tianshuang Qiu, and Zhixun Su.Robust Visual Tracking via Incremental Low-rank Features Learning. Neurocomputing, 2013 (IF=1.634，SCI, C类期刊).
1. Jinshan Pan, **Risheng Liu**, Zhixun Su, and Xianfeng Gu. Kernel Estimation from Salient Structure for Robust Motion Deblurring. Signal Processing: Image Communication, 2013 (IF=1.423, SCI, C类期刊).
1. Lili Pan, **Risheng Liu** and Mei Xie. Mixture of Related Regressions for Head Pose Estimation. ICIP 2013  (EI, C类会议).
1. Jinshan Pan, Zhixun Su, Maoran Bian and **Risheng Liu**. Saliency Detection Based on an Edge-preserving Filter. ICIP 2013  (EI, C类会议).
1. Kewei Tang, **Risheng Liu**, and Zhixun Su. Dimensionality Reduction via Low Rank Regression. GDC 2013 (Best Student Paper) 

### 2012 and before
1. **Risheng Liu**, Zhouchen Lin, Fernando De la Torre and Zhixun Su. Fixed-Rank Representation for Unsupervised Visual Learning. CVPR 2012 (EI, A类会议).
1. Zhouchen Lin, **Risheng Liu** and Zhixun Su. Linearized Alternating Direction Method with Adaptive Penalty for Low-Rank Representation. NIPS 2011 (EI, B类会议).
1. **Risheng Liu**, Zhouchen Lin, Wei Zhang and Zhixun Su. Learning PDEs for Image Restoration via Optimal Control. ECCV 2010 (EI, B类会议).
1. **Risheng Liu**, Zhouchen Lin, Zhixun Su and Kewei Tang. Feature Extraction by Learning Lorentzian Metric Tensor and Its Extensions. Pattern Recognition, 2010 (IF=3.219，SCI，B类期刊).
1. **Risheng Liu**, Zhixun Su, Zhouchen Lin and Xiaoyu Hou. Lorentzian Discriminant Projection and Its Applications. ACCV 2009 (EI, C类会议).
1. **Risheng Liu**, Ruru Hao and Zhixun Su. Mixture of Manifolds Clustering via Low Rank Embedding. Journal of Information and Computational Science, 2011 (EI).
1. Hao Ji, **Risheng Liu**, Fei Su, Zhixun Su and Yan Tian. Robust Head Pose Estimation via Convex Regularized Sparse Regression. ICIP 2011 (C类会议).
1. Lijun Wang, **Risheng Liu** and Zhixun Su. Robust Visual Tracking via Incremental Lorentzian Discriminant Projection. Journal of Information and Computational Science, 2012 (EI).
1. Kewei Tang, Chao Yu, **Risheng Liu** and Zhixun Su. A Semi-supervised Dimensionality Reduction Framework for Face Recognition Based on Sparse Lorentzian Metric Tensors. Journal of Information and Computational Science, 2011 (EI).
1. 唐科威, **刘日升**, 杜慧, 苏志勋. 一种基于张量和洛仑兹几何的降维方法.自动化学报, 2011 (EI).
